loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel totals and member breakdowns; 4 of 10 panel members (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11) are dark (no data) and render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); 4 members (Solar Incomers, Transformers, UPS-05/06) are dark and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: AI narrative generated from panel rollup; per-member narrative slots are rendered from member meters (GIC-01-N3, GIC-01-N4, GIC-01-N5, GIC-01-N8, GIC-02-N2, GIC-02-N5) which have data; supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark and do not contribute to the narrative.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total feeder consumption and per-member breakdown (UPS/BPDB) from live panel members; denominator (contracted capacity) is unknown for this asset and omitted.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend and peak; per-member data is live for UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04, but dark for UPS-05/06 and all supply incomers.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate stats from 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their slots.
